feedback_files.tests/test_member_override_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def database():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    for name in ("notification_config.sql", "notification_resolution.sql"):
        connection.executescript((ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    connection.execute("INSERT INTO system_channel VALUES ('email', 1)")
    connection.execute("INSERT INTO workspace VALUES (10, 'Operations')")
    connection.execute("INSERT INTO member VALUES (10, 7, 'Ari')")
    return connection


def resolved(db):
    return db.execute("SELECT enabled FROM resolved_member_channel WHERE workspace_id = 10 AND member_id = 7 AND channel = 'email'").fetchone()[0]


def test_explicit_member_disable_wins_over_enabled_workspace():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO workspace_channel_override VALUES (10, 'email', 1)")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO member_channel_override VALUES (10, 7, 'email', 0)")
    assert resolved(db) == 0


def test_null_member_override_is_retained_and_inherits_workspace():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO workspace_channel_override VALUES (10, 'email', 0)")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO member_channel_override VALUES (10, 7, 'email', NULL)")
    assert db.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_channel_override").fetchone()[0] == 1
    assert resolved(db) == 0
